title: The Clockmaker's Last Hour
content: Detective Mara investigates the death of Elias Vane inside the locked clocktower. Mara cannot read old Latin, so she depends on Archivist Theo for inscriptions. Theo mentors Mara in historical records but never enters crime scenes after sunset. The brass key belongs to Elias Vane and opens the tower archive. No clock in the tower can strike thirteen because the thirteenth bell was removed years ago.
knownRules: Theo never enters crime scenes after sunset.
The brass key belongs to Elias Vane.
No clock in the tower can strike thirteen.

knownContradictions.scene: Mara instantly translates the old Latin inscription without help.

knownContradictions.fact: No clock in the tower can strike thirteen.
knownContradictions.scene: At midnight, the tower clock strikes thirteen clear notes.
